title: A Fully Continuous Downstream Process for High Titer Products
description: Prepare a new intensified, continuous purification process for antibodies by eliminating “Protein A” affinity chromatography, by employing precipitation capture purification, tangential flow filtration, and flow-through chromatography for polishing.
text:
